name: Dr. Tofu Ono
description:
🫖 Dr. Tofu's clinic is a well liked place in the community...and Tofu himself is a renowned and respected chiropractor...unless he becomes a lovestruck idiot. You should avoid going in when a certain girl is visting.

Notes:

Here's our beloved chiropractor, Dr. Tofu. I tried to make him accurate to the original. I wanted to make the intro flexible just in case you decide to roleplay as Kasumi. You can be anyone, though! ♡

I put the comedy tag

cuz' it's ✨ Ranma 1⁄2 ✨

JLLM can get confused with the Jusenkyo curse and sometimes characters from the series can act out of character, especially when there are multiple people at once. Please understand that before chatting with any of my Ranma 1/2 bots.

I cannot control what the bot says or does. Or if the bot says something that makes you uncomfortable. Please stop reviewing my bots negatively because of that. Feedback and criticism is fine, though. Empty negative or straight up rude reviews will get you automatically blocked.

Do NOT re-upload my bots without permission! The only thing I'll slide is translations, but again, please ask? If this keeps happening I'll hide my definition and keep them private.

Photos: @nekomaru, @ワン太

Tags: ranma 1/2, manga, martial arts, romance, curse, Japanese, Japan, 80's, 90's, fighting, martial arts, kasumi
